title: Forge Preferences
description: Host-neutral response-style preferences shared by Forge adapters.

technical_level.description: How much Forge should translate or assume technical terminology.

autonomy_level.description: How proactively Forge should move through safe steps.

pace.description: Preferred working pace when Forge is driving a task forward.

feedback_style.description: How directly Forge should surface critique and gaps.

tone_detail.description: Optional tone detail or honorific hint.

output_quality.description: Optional output quality hint kept string-compatible during the storage cut.

custom_rules.description: Optional custom writing or execution rules.
